mapper.insert: insert into user (password, name, email, role) values (#{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{role})
mapper.select: select id as id, password as password, name as name, email as email, role as role from user where email = #{email} and is_deleted = 0
select id as id, password as password, name as name, email as email, role as role from user where email = #{email} and password = #{password} and is_deleted = 0
